summary: Sprint Global DB & Geo-Logic (migration + Smart Geolocation + Global Search + Dynamic TrustBar) verified. 8/9 feature tests PASS. 1 CRITICAL regression: search API 500 on any hierarchical where= (country/region/city) because SQL migration NOT applied to Supabase yet and applySmartWhereFilter has NO defensive fallback. Legacy district slugs still work.

critical.issue: Returns HTTP 500 with PostgREST error 'column listings.country_code does not exist' (or region_code / city_code). applySmartWhereFilter unconditionally pushes new columns into OR-clause, but migration 20260201_global_pivot.sql has NOT been applied to Supabase DB in preview/prod. Reproduced: /api/v2/search?where=phuket, ?where=RU, ?where=TH, ?where=moscow all 500. Only raw legacy district slugs (e.g. where=patong) succeed because resolveWhereTarget returns null for them. This BREAKS every hero chip click (Moscow/Phuket/Bangkok/Bali/Dubai/...) on both desktop WhereCombobox and MobileSearchBottomSheet until the migration is applied. E1's claim in the review note ('frontend backward-compatible, country_code/region_code/city_code будут IS NULL до применения миграции, но OR-clause работает через district fallback') is INCORRECT — PostgREST rejects the whole query with 400/500 when the column doesn't exist; it does not silently ignore the predicate.

minor.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to fetch' / 500 in browser console on home page (pre-existing from iteration_4; unrelated to this sprint).

integration_issues.issue: Every non-district chip (Moscow/Phuket/Bangkok/Bali/Dubai/…) triggers the 500 in the search API described above; /listings page will render EmptyState or error state instead of filtered results until migration runs.

tests_performed.geo_whoami: PASS — GET /api/v2/geo/whoami → 200 {country: null, source: 'unknown'} on localhost (expected, no cf-ipcountry header).
tests_performed.geo_reorder_RU_cache: PASS — with localStorage gostaylo_user_geo_v1={country:'RU'} injected via addInitScript, WhereCombobox popover shows Russia group FIRST, then Thailand, then World. DOM position check iRu=73 < iTh=115 < iWorld=159. Screenshot confirms visually (flag 🇷🇺 Russia with Moscow/SPb/Sochi/Kazan on top).
tests_performed.trustbar_default_worldwide:
PASS — goto /, scroll to TrustBar: first

label reads 'listings worldwide' (EN).
tests_performed.trustbar_where_RU_country_code: PASS — /?where=RU → label 'listings in Russia' (localization from COUNTRY_PRESETS).
tests_performed.resolve_where_target_code_review: PASS — /app/lib/locations/resolve-where-target.js correctly returns {level:'country', countryCode:'TH', regions:[TH-PHK,TH-BKK,TH-SUR,TH-KRA,TH-CHN], cities:[phuket-city,bangkok,…], districts:[Patong,Kamala,…]} for input 'TH'. City/region/label-match paths all implemented.
tests_performed.applySmartWhereFilter_code_review: PASS (logic) / FAIL (runtime) — OR-clause correctly composed with country_code.eq / region_code.eq / city_code.eq / district.eq, BUT no feature-flag to skip new columns when migration not applied → runtime 500 (see critical issue).
tests_performed.api_search_where_phuket: FAIL — HTTP 500 'column listings.region_code does not exist'.
tests_performed.api_search_where_RU: FAIL — HTTP 500 'column listings.country_code does not exist'.
tests_performed.api_search_where_moscow: FAIL — HTTP 500 'column listings.city_code does not exist'.
tests_performed.api_search_where_patong_legacy: PASS — HTTP 200, 1 listing (legacy district path, resolveWhereTarget returns null, only district OR applied).
tests_performed.migration_sql_integrity: PASS — /app/supabase/migrations/20260201_global_pivot.sql contains BEGIN/COMMIT, ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country_code/region_code/city_code, idempotent UPDATE for Phuket (COALESCE guards), 4 CREATE INDEX, CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geo_locations with CHECK + UNIQUE, seed INSERT … ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for 4 countries / 9 regions / 9 cities, and RLS policy wrapped in DO $$ / pg_policies check. Fully idempotent.
tests_performed.migration_runner_safety: PASS — node /app/scripts/migrate-global-pivot.mjs without env vars prints clear instructions ('MIGRATION NOT APPLIED AUTOMATICALLY', list of env vars, path to SQL) and exits 0 without traceback.
tests_performed.mobile_bottom_sheet: Not re-tested this run (already PASS in iteration_4 with same country-groups structure).

action_items: CRITICAL: Either (a) apply migration 20260201_global_pivot.sql to Supabase DB before releasing, OR (b) guard applySmartWhereFilter in /app/lib/api/run-listings-search-get.js so it does NOT emit country_code.eq / region_code.eq / city_code.eq predicates until migration is applied. Suggested: env flag NEXT_PUBLIC_GLOBAL_PIVOT_APPLIED=true, or lazy schema probe cached at startup. Current state: every hero destination chip (Moscow/Phuket/Bangkok/Bali/Dubai/…) produces HTTP 500 on /api/v2/search.

Optional after migration applied: smoke-test the hierarchical search queries again to confirm parent→children rollup works (e.g. where=RU returns Moscow+SPb listings; where=TH returns Phuket+Bangkok).
critical_code_review_comments: applySmartWhereFilter in /app/lib/api/run-listings-search-get.js (lines 132-170) has no DB-schema awareness. The claim 'backward-compatible because district fallback exists' is wrong — PostgREST fails the WHOLE OR clause when ANY referenced column is missing, not just the specific predicate. Must guard with a flag or schema probe.
resolveWhereTarget is clean, well-commented, handles country/region/city/label-match; no issues.
useUserGeo correctly implements 3-tier strategy (cache → /api/v2/geo/whoami → Accept-Language), 7-day TTL, silent localStorage failures; no bugs.
reorderDestinationsByGeo: mapping RU/BY/UA/KZ/AM/KG/TJ/UZ→russia and TH/MY/VN/SG/LA/KH/ID→thailand is sensible. Works as verified by UI test.

TrustBar: getLocationDisplayName correctly resolves country/region/city via COUNTRY_PRESETS labels with language fallback to en; dynamic listingsLabel composed via getUIText('trustListingsIn'/'trustListingsWorldwide'); verified RU/EN runtime.
Migration SQL is well-structured, IDEMPOTENT, and includes verification queries in a trailing comment block — production-safe to apply.
migrate-global-pivot.mjs gracefully exits with user-friendly instructions when env vars absent — good UX.

success_rate.backend: 20% (1/5 search-api runtime tests pass; migration not applied)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows tested this sprint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Migration 20260201_global_pivot.sql must be applied (via Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor, since no SUPABASE_DB_URL/ACCESS_TOKEN in preview env) OR applySmartWhereFilter must be guarded before any re-test of /api/v2/search?where=<country|region|city>. Frontend UI + hooks + TrustBar labels are solid and do NOT need re-test. After migration apply, smoke-test: where=RU, where=TH, where=phuket, where=moscow, where=bali, where=patong (legacy), all should 200 with listings.
rca of the issue: RCA: applySmartWhereFilter constructs a PostgREST .or() string like 'country_code.eq.RU,region_code.eq.RU-MOW,...,district.eq.Патонг'. PostgREST parses the filter client-side but Postgres evaluates the predicate in the WHERE clause; if any column name is unknown the query fails with SQLSTATE 42703 ('column … does not exist'). There is no per-term graceful-degrade in PostgREST OR clauses. Mitigations: (a) apply the migration (preferred, 1-click in Supabase SQL Editor — SQL is idempotent), (b) add a schema-probe cache at supabaseAdmin bootstrap that records which of country_code/region_code/city_code exist, and conditionally append only available predicates to orParts.
